hero.eyebrow: Established Medical Equipment OEM Manufacturer and Authorised Supplier
hero.title: 6 Decades as India's Most Accountable Medical Equipment Partner
hero.description:
We manufacture CSSD equipment and sterilisation systems at our Mumbai facility and are an authorised distributor for 14+ leading global and domestic medical equipment brands to equip every other department in your healthcare facility:
Operating Theatres (OT), Radiology/Imaging, Critical Care, Neonatal/Maternal Care, Oncology, Dental, and Specialized Diagnostics among others

hero_panel.title: OEM manufacturer with direct service accountability
hero_panel.description: Long manufacturing heritage, 14 integrated global and domestic brands, and a single post-sale service relationship. All under 1 partner.

specs.label: Scope
specs.value: Manufactured Equipment + 14 Global and Domestic Brands

capabilities.label: Core Capabilities
capabilities.title: Two Pillars of Healthcare Technology Excellence

cards.title: Indigenous Manufacturing
cards.description:
Engineering world-class Sterilization Systems and CSSD infrastructure 
built to global standards at our Mumbai Factory.

cards.title: Global & Domestic Distribution
cards.description:
Authorised integration partner for 14+ global and domestic medical equipment brands across India. 
Catering to every department in your healthcare facility.

capabilities.description:
PEIC is the only partner in India that brings an OEM manufacturer's technical discipline to both its own sterilization systems and the other medical equipment brands it supplies. 
Fewer vendor handoffs. Integrated commercial Terms. Clearer service ownership. Equipment decisions backed by engineering judgment.

workflow.label: Engineering DNA
workflow.title: A single technical chain from specification to support
workflow.description: Every project is treated as a lifecycle system: requirement mapping, product selection, installation, validation, training, spare parts, and service accountability.

steps.title: Clinical Requirement
steps.description: Understand and map departments, load, compliance and procurement constraints.

steps.title: Equipment Architecture
steps.description: Manufactured and partner systems configured as one operating portfolio.

steps.title: Commissioning
steps.description: Installation, calibration, training and documentation for biomedical teams.

steps.title: Lifecycle Support
steps.description: AMC, CMC, spares, refurbishing and response planning after deployment.

advantage.label: Why PEIC
advantage.title: Built for procurement scrutiny
advantage.description: For direct outreach, tenders, service planning, and multi-department purchases, PEIC presents the credibility and engineering expertise of an established manufacturer with the scope to integrate 14+ global and domestic medical equipment brands. A single vendor to consolidate and cater to your procurement needs.

clients.label: Our Existing Clients
clients.title: Institutional references and long-term relationships
clients.description: For nearly six decades, we have delivered turnkey department setups, medical hardware, and engineering support to the country's leading corporate hospital chains, government facilities, and medical colleges.

clients_list.name: Indian Railways
clients_list.tagline: Western, Central, Northern, ECOR & South-Eastern zones
